payload.message: Run Morning Intelligence Report. Read /home/robotin/.openclaw/workspace/infra/morning_intelligence_report/prompt.txt and sources JSON. Use web_search/web_fetch to gather today's info, produce report text per prompt. Save log markdown to /home/robotin/.openclaw/workspace/state/morning_intelligence_report/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Then sanitize it for speech using: python3 /home/robotin/.openclaw/workspace/infra/morning_intelligence_report/sanitize_tts.py <md> <clean_txt>. Render MP3 with Alonso using: /home/robotin/.openclaw/workspace/tmp/edge_tts_venv/bin/python /home/robotin/.openclaw/workspace/infra/morning_intelligence_report/render_alonso.py <clean_txt> <mp3>. Finally send the MP3 to Telegram chatId 8024871665 as a voice message attachment (message tool).
